programs.name: mrv_fc_pidx
programs.notes: fusion: MRV + forward-checking + pattern-index (built ONCE, reused across structures) + per-size deadline + capped candidates; sizes 9/11 use pre-verified fillable templates. The core palette-scaling fix.

programs.name: theme_lcv
programs.notes: fusion: theme-first seating into longest slots + MRV + least-constraining-value ordering + pattern-index (built once) + templates at 9/11.

programs.name: ac3_mrv
programs.notes: fusion: AC-3 preprocessing + maintained arc consistency (trail-based undo) + MRV over bounded domains + pattern-index (built once) + templates at 9/11.

programs.name: reference_v1
programs.notes: base seed: reliability baseline (random symmetric construction)

programs.name: csp_ac3
programs.notes: base seed: CSP backtracking maintaining arc consistency (family 2)

programs.name: beam_search
programs.notes: base seed: beam search, no backtracking, most-constrained-first (family 3)

programs.name: vocab_first
programs.notes: base teacher: vocab-first fill that maximizes coverage

programs.name: template_ac3
programs.notes: base teacher: pre-verified 11x11 grid templates + AC-3 fill (family 4)
